final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (小红书) female wellness lifestyle content.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, cohesive aesthetic with soft治愈 (healing) vibes — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), with clear boundaries between each cell for easy cropping into 9 individual posts; each cell must be centered and complete, no text near grid lines
Subject: must include all 9 cells with specific content:
  Cell 1 (cover): main title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", visual elements: soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask
  Cell 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", elements: phone, moon, sleepy expression illustration
  Cell 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", elements: bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", elements: AC, thermometer, blanket
  Cell 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", elements: coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", elements: bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", elements: notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", elements: clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", elements: breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: must include soft lifestyle elements throughout: pillows, moon, stars, hot milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, beds
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, soothing, sleep-healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant, with small amounts of dark brown text — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft, tactile, premium editorial feel — exact material choices are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified in Subject field above, large and readable, no English
Constraints: must be 3:4 vertical format suitable for Xiaohongshu, 9-grid must be cleanly divisible, all text in Chinese only, no text near grid boundaries, magazine-quality layout, premium aesthetic suitable for knowledge-sharing content
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing vibes, overly flashy decorations, cluttered layouts, text garbling, English text
